nodes.name: JobType

fields.name: module_name
fields.description: Dotted name of the Python module providing this job

fields.name: job_class_name
fields.description: Name of the Python class providing this job

fields.name: grouping
fields.description: Human-readable grouping that this job belongs to

fields.name: description
fields.description: Markdown formatting and a limited subset of HTML are supported

fields.name: installed
fields.description: Whether the Python module and class providing this job are presently installed and loadable

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether this job can be executed by users

fields.name: is_job_hook_receiver
fields.description: Whether this job is a job hook receiver

fields.name: is_job_button_receiver
fields.description: Whether this job is a job button receiver

fields.name: has_sensitive_variables
fields.description: Whether this job contains sensitive variables

fields.name: is_singleton
fields.description: Whether this job should fail to run if another instance of this job is already running

fields.name: approval_required
fields.description: Whether the job requires approval from another user before running

fields.name: hidden
fields.description: Whether the job defaults to not being shown in the UI

fields.name: dryrun_default
fields.description: Whether the job defaults to running with dryrun argument set to true

fields.name: read_only
fields.description: Set to true if the job does not make any changes to the environment

fields.name: soft_time_limit
fields.description:
Maximum runtime in seconds before the job will receive a SoftTimeLimitExceeded exception.
Set to 0 to use Nautobot system default

fields.name: time_limit
fields.description:
Maximum runtime in seconds before the job will be forcibly terminated.
Set to 0 to use Nautobot system default

fields.name: supports_dryrun
fields.description: If supported, allows the job to bypass approval when running with dryrun argument set to true

fields.name: grouping_override
fields.description: If set, the configured grouping will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: name_override
fields.description: If set, the configured name will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: description_override
fields.description: If set, the configured description will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: approval_required_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: dryrun_default_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: hidden_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: soft_time_limit_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: time_limit_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: has_sensitive_variables_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: job_queues_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: default_job_queue_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

fields.name: is_singleton_override
fields.description: If set, the configured value will remain even if the underlying Job source code changes

nodes.description: Graphql Type Object for Job model.

nodes.name: ScheduledJobType

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable description of this scheduled task

fields.name: task
fields.description: The name of the Celery task that should be run. (Example: "proj.tasks.import_contacts")

fields.name: one_off
fields.description: If True, the schedule will only run the task a single time

fields.name: start_time
fields.description: Datetime when the schedule should begin triggering the task to run

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Set to False to disable the schedule

fields.name: last_run_at
fields.description: Datetime that the schedule last triggered the task to run. Reset to None if enabled is set to False.

fields.name: total_run_count
fields.description: Running count of how many times the schedule has triggered the task

fields.name: date_changed
fields.description: Datetime that this scheduled job was last modified

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed description about the details of this scheduled job

fields.name: approved_at
fields.description: Datetime that the schedule was approved

fields.name: crontab
fields.description: Cronjob syntax string for custom scheduling

nodes.description: Graphql Type Object for Job model.
